data.description: FINITE 14-CITY MANHATTAN TSP. Cities: 0=(66,15), 1=(58,54), 2=(89,1), 3=(58,43), 4=(40,7), 5=(31,27), 6=(31,76), 7=(70,30), 8=(23,29), 9=(25,89), 10=(47,5), 11=(11,66), 12=(29,82), 13=(80,95). Produce a Hamiltonian cycle beginning at city "0"; return to 0 is implicit. Minimise total Manhattan distance. Candidate content MUST be one JSON object exactly in this useful shape: {"tour":["0",...,"13"],"rationale":"short text"}. The tour must contain every city ID exactly once and must not repeat 0 at the end.
